description.case: After completing the task topic, create a sharing link and submit the link to the official review through the entrance below. For cases that pass the review and are adopted, {{min}} to {{max}} points will be awarded based on the rating (the higher the rating, the more points). Each case link can only be submitted once, and there is no limit to the number of cases each person can submit.
description.invite: When the number of new users registered through your invitation link meets the specified criteria, you can directly claim the corresponding point rewards by clicking the button below. If the new users you invite activate a paid package for the first time, you will receive additional point rewards after the end of their monthly package cycle (the additional reward points will be automatically issued).

wonderfulCaseModal.replayLinkPlaceholder: Please provide the case link you hope the official will adopt and paste the sharing playback link of the task topic.
wonderfulCaseModal.rulesContent: After creating a sharing link for the completed task topic, submit the link to the official review through the form below. Approved and adopted cases will be awarded 1,000 to 20,000 points based on their rating. Each case link can only be submitted once, and there is no limit to the number of cases each person can submit.
